title: 日本ダービーの後に・たゆたう雷電

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Left in the dust with our dreams of victory
unrealized, the curtain closes on the Derby.
Emotions run high...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... It's over... The runway we can only walk once... is done.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Trainer... I gave it all I got...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: That wasn't the way I pictured it in my head! White Lightning's s'posed to be more... more...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
choice_data_list: You still did a great job.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...Thanks. But y'know, between the "haves" and
the "have-nots." I really am a "have-not."

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I wasn't born into no fancy family, and my body's got nothin goin' for it... I thought my guts would make up for everythin', but then that happened before the Derby...
choice_data_list: But you still made it here. That's incredible.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Urrgh... that's right! I've gotta remember that,
otherwise I don't think my heart can take much
more of this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't tell if her cry is one of sadness or rage, but
it rumbles like thunder through the Fuchu sky.
